response.text:

rationale: r2c5 is on the distrusted_peers list and their SoC (0.28) remains below our share_min_soc_frac threshold (0.5), making this request inconsistent with conservative sharing policy; accepting would deplete reserves to an unreliable peer.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
